title: goniophlebium plesiosorum
intro: Goniophlebium plesiosorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium plesiosorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Goniophlebium plesiosorum are made by drying the leaves and using them in infusions or decoctions to treat various ailments.
